column1: # Panel for sra_compare.sh — fqxv archive vs the native .sra a user would
# otherwise store. Reuses the run accessions in datasets.tsv and adds long-read
# platforms so the comparison spans regimes. Columns:
# size_class=large rows (multi-Gbp full runs) are skipped unless
# SRA_INCLUDE_LARGE=1 — the HiFi run is ~23 Gbp / ~17.6 GB .sra.
